data.title: Rework sound system for better music support
Remove outdated code path
Remove outdated line in call_group() description
Groups of arguments binded with chained `Callable.bind` calls are appended in reversed call order
Improve appearance of the material editor preview
Vulkan: TAA does not make the editor redraw until it has fully converged
Fix incorrect Android scancodes
Fix too thin underline in brace match
Vulkan: Strange black line artifact in SSAO when Half Size is enabled
Vulkan: Negative scale doesn't flip geometry normals, resulting in inverted appearance
`SkeletonModificationStack3D.strength` distorts bones when using SkeletonModification3DLookAt
Sometimes I get `Failed to create Windows OS window` after undo/redo actions (DisplayServer regression)
GDExtension move_and_collide instantly crashes game
Use integer types in Image and ImageTexture methods
Viewport width & height both off by +12 pixels (DisplayServer regression)
Use a SpinBox in the inspector array resize dialog
Fix dead link in TAA resolve shader comment
Make Image.get_size() return a Vector2i instead of a Vector2
Define bold, italics and mono fonts in editor log for `print_rich()`
Can't directly modify points of Line2D
Image.get_size() should return a Vector2i
Vulkan: Normal map on MeshInstance2D doesn't work anymore
Fix SubViewport not rendering correctly

spirv-reflect: Update to latest commit
Remove `NOTIFICATION_ENTER_TREE` when paired with `NOTIFICATION_THEME_CHANGED`
Fix excessive calls to `NOTIFICATION_THEME_CHANGED`
Flush accumulated input events on iOS
Fixed bug in `GridContainer` with hidden children
Vulkan: Subsurface scattering artifacts
Clicking the "X" button multiple times will close the editor (DisplayServer regression)
AssetLib: Only notify when unavailable in verbose mode
Account for relative z-indexes when y-sorting
AudioStreamPlayer: Clarify that no validation is made on 'bus' name
Fix regressions from Font refactor (2)
Only include editor/SCsub when building the editor: tools=yes
Fix regressions from Font refactor.
Export: Fix comma handling in feature list RTL
Features list in export window shows misplaced comma and space
Use clang as assembler to ensure preprocessing is done, and add assembler "target" flag.
zstd: Restrict huf_decompress_amd64.S to Linux and macOS x86_64
Compiling for Android on Windows fails
[macOS] Improve file association handling, and allow URL schema handling.
`TextureImageLayered::update_layer()` - Changed valid check to null check, added error messages
C#: New `RPCAttribute`
ShaderMaterial not working in CanvasItem and spamming infinite errors
Ensure NuGet.config directory exists
EditorScenePostImportPlugin: Return requested option value
C#: Add `BezierInterpolate` method
C#: Enable exporting nodes to the inspector
Prevent possible crash when creating or deleting a mesh with armature
Add C# support for bitfield enums (flags)
Potential fix for a crash on expanding error tree item
Remove Octree [4.x]
Check if GL manager exist to prevent crash when using multithreaded renderer with Vulkan.
Fix heap-use-after-free when closing a scene with its builtin script open
Fix priority of annotated type vs initializer type
Initializer type wins against explicit annotation
Remove unused anisotropy setter/getter methods in VoxelGI
Disable Expand by default in VideoStreamPlayer
Fix small typo in LightmapGI class reference
[3.x] Fix incorrect Android scancodes
VCS: Fix wrong number of args passed into _refresh_commit_list
[3.x] Fix incorrect Android scancodes
VCS: Fix wrong number of args passed into _refresh_commit_list
Improve documentation for HTTPRequest's `timeout` property (3.x)
[3.5] Flush accumulated input events on iOS
[3.5.rc6] Broken touch input on iOS
Black screen when opening a project in the web version [3.5.rc6]
Input: Re-enable input accumulation disabled by error in 3.4
[3.x] Update TextureRegion editor when NinePatchRect/StyleBoxTexture changes
[3.x] Fix icon color for Label3D and CPUParticles2D
[3.x] Fix LineEdit caret after using arrow key to deselect
[3.x] Some node icons use the Godot 4 colors
GDScript: Fix autocompletetion showing class names with an underscore
Fix issue causing the Android Editor port to crash when saving a scene
Fix the directory copy bug issue
[3.x] Do not set gravity and damping when Custom Integrator is enabled.
[3.x] Use custom key struct, instead of raw hashes for the Label3D cache to avoid potential hash collisions.
TextureRegion does not update when the values are changed.
[3.5] Avoid WebGL shader error on Safari/iOS
Problems with EditorResourcePicker `handle_menu_selected` function signature
Input: Document that accumulated input is disabled by default
[3.5] Avoid GL undefined behavior in ubershaders
[3.x] Android: Refactor Custom Build options in export preset
[3.5 RC 5] GLES3 projects with Asynchronous shaders causing `_gl_debug_print` errors.
Can't Export or save a scene on Android
"Changing the "Target SDK" is not valid" error even though I never tried to
Godot 3.4.3 does not load on Windows 11 (expired signature)
Fix GLTF texture filename decoding
Clamp Viewport shadow atlas sizes to improve usability
Large idle times (>95% of frame time) when using Godot's drag-and-drop built-in functions
[GDScript] Add 'sort' and 'has' methods to pooled arrays
Input accumulation is off by default but the documentation states it is on by default
GLTF Punctual Lights don't import properly when Physical Light Attenuation is enabled
Only show relevant properties in the DirectionalLight inspector (3.x)
[3.x] Add error messages to `String::bin_to_int64`, and accept capital B in prefix
[3.x] Add error messages `String::hex_to_int` functions, and accept capital X in prefix
Tweak default sky appearance to avoid blue tint in shadows in new projects
SSAO not working in GLES3 HTML5 Chrome/Firefox
Godot script editor: tab character is wider than 4 spaces
Cant see subdictionaries while debugging
[3.x] Rework scene creation dialog
NavigationAgents - schedule pathfinds to prevent performance blips
[3.x, macOS, Windows, X11] Add stylus inverted/eraser support to InputEventMouseMotion event
NavigationAgent2D - robust waypoint detection
[WIP] [3.x] Add interactive music module by @DanielMatarov (GSoC 2019)
HSlider value_changed signal now emitted multiple times per frame when moving slider. (changed 3.3-3.4)
Label letter missing
Increase the max number of PoolVector allocations from 65535 to 1048576
[3.x] Implement textual ext/subresource IDs.
[3.x] Move platform/*/export folders to editor/export
Proof-of-concept for Physics.simulate() for discussion purposes
Fix `property_list_changed_notify` causing full inspector rebuild
[3.x] Deterministic constraint map in Godot Physics solver
Expose `Node` callbacks for adding and removing children
Add a connection flag to prevent firing signals from editor
Make Gridmap consist of scenes, rather than meshes
Add filter and quick navigation options to the signal connection dialog
Add an easy way to change target path in AnimationTrack
Add an editor setting to enable border-less mode
Turn Reflection Probe's Ambient Color Energy into Ambient Energy
Add a visualisation to see the current delta-angle in the 3D rotation gizmo
Change default 3D viewport grid primary stem from 8 to 10

Make Gridmap consist of scenes, rather than meshes
Add filter and quick navigation options to the signal connection dialog

Turn Reflection Probe's Ambient Color Energy into Ambient Energy

Change default 3D viewport grid primary stem from 8 to 10
Detect misspelled virtual overrides in scripts
Instantiate sub nodes from C++
Tweak default environment and graphics settings in new Godot 3.6 projects
Allow new Tilemap cells with scenes to return the node/scene they create.
Enable FXAA by default for better visuals out of the box
Expose settings overwrites for autoloads
Use macos and ios names for scons platforms
Implement Shader and VisualShader Uniform Groups (+ Subgroups)
Port TextureRect's stretch modes to VideoStreamPlayer
Use two-pass rendering for double sided transparent objects
Add support for "inactive" properties
Support GLSL style initialization and functions for vectors
Add an editor action to apply changes from inheriting scenes to the base scene
Allow sending node references through RPC (node paths internally)
Increase Godot shading consistency with other real time PBR rendering software such as Blender Eevee, Unreal Engine, Unity, etc.
Add scene size check into editor to prevent hanging on displaying extra large scene trees
Allow Godot to skip parsing CLI options and pass them to projects
Add a property to control VoxelGI sky contribution
Allow user to prefer SDFGI reflections when both VoxelGI and SDFGI are used
Allow adjusting padding for foreground/background color highlighting in RichTextLabel
Add Shadows Only render mode to Light2D
Add a CollisionObjectSpatial2D implementation
Increase resizing flexibility of Godot Engine Editor window(s) like in Visual Studio
Extend `Resource` ownership functionalities to `preload`s in GDScript
Allow overriding a member variable's type in inherited classes
Increase resizing flexibility of Godot Engine Editor window(s) like in Visual Studio
Extend `Resource` ownership functionalities to `preload`s in GDScript
[Audio] Read Metadata from WAV MP3 File
Press `alt` to send keyboard focus to the menu bar
Add support for multiple accelerometer and gyroscope inputs
WebAssembly.compileStreaming vs WebAssembly.compile for improved web export load times
Add support for horizontal scrolling in `Tree` using mouse buttons (`WHEEL_LEFT`/`WHEEL_RIGHT`)
add reflection probe support as an option to subviewport camera
Implement XMLParser.get_current_line()
Expose the sampling mode of textures in `Decal`
add infinte inertia property to characterbody3D in godot4
Add proposal triage and review guidelines
Allow overriding a member variable's type in inherited classes
Allow to disable TextEdit scroll
New Tweens should run parallel by default
Autoload and scene tree should be combined into a unified system
Add support for loading and saving AVIF images
Menu buttons should be separated into menu items as nodes
Make grouping exported variables easier
Show the transform operation numbers in 2D
